aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured conversational content and authority signals. While the website has basic SEO elements, it misses opportunities to align with AI-driven search behavior.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content to address common HVAC queries.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC services and installations.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No engagement with customer Q&A on the profile.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema details (e.g., address, geo-coordinates).
No FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.
No HowTo schema for explaining HVAC services or installations.
Missing Service schema to highlight specific HVAC offerings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured, conversational content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC installation near me' or 'best heat pump services' where AI assistants seek detailed, authoritative answers.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Incorporate FAQ content addressing common HVAC questions and problems.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position the company as an expert by publishing detailed guides on HVAC technology and energy efficiency.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured FAQ and HowTo content are being cited by AI assistants, while your site is overlooked.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates conversational content, strategic schema markup, and authority-building tactics to make your business the go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven HVAC Leads with Our AEO Expertise
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services more visible to AI search users.
cta: Let's discuss how to make your business the top choice for AI-driven HVAC queries.
